title: PhD Candidate — Formal Methods in Natural Language Processing
department: Leiden Institute of Advanced Computer Science (LIACS)
supervisor: Dr. Gijs Wijnholds (daily supervisor) + Prof. Suzan Verberne (promotor)
eligibility: MSc in CS / AI / Computational Linguistics / Logic / Mathematics or related
Strong background in NLP and programming (Python)
Interest in formal/type-theoretic methods for language
notes: Strong fit — formal methods + interpretability sits at intersection of MSc transformer-fine-tune work + Cambridge/Saarland themes. Verberne is well-known IR/NLP researcher.
